key_findings: Prerender snapshots chrome-only: vc-frontend has no window.prerenderReady; content renders async after shell so snapshot fires too early
Site-wide robots=noindex (index.html default never flipped); no canonical, no JSON-LD even after hydration
Sitemap generated/exported but not crawlable: /sitemap.xml (robots.txt target) 404s; index at /sitemap/sitemap.xml=200 but all child <loc> /en-US/sitemap/*.xml 404
Catalog SeoInfo data gap: products 0/30 sampled have pageTitle/metaDescription (4579 total); categories have title=name but ~96% lack metaDescription (445 total)

Layer proven: with seoInfo populated, hydrated SPA renders configured title/description/keywords (MATCH) on PDP+PLP; robots=noindex and missing canonical/JSON-LD are independent of seoInfo and noindex is not auth-gated
actions_taken: Created sitemap 'seo.xml' for B2B-store and ran Export to store assets (job SUCCESS)
